params.asset: The address of the underlying asset to borrow
params.onBehalfOf: The address that will receive the debt

returns.currentLiquidationThreshold: Weighted avg liquidation threshold (in bps, e.g. 8250 = 82.5%)

params.amount: The amount to repay (type(uint256).max for full debt)
params.asset: The address of the underlying asset to repay
params.onBehalfOf: The address of the user who will get their debt reduced

params.asset: The address of the underlying asset to supply
params.onBehalfOf: The address that will receive the aTokens

params.amount: The amount to withdraw (type(uint256).max for full balance)
params.asset: The address of the underlying asset to withdraw
params.to: The address that will receive the withdrawn asset

borrow(address,uint256,uint256,uint16,ad.notice: Borrows an amount of asset with variable rate.

getUserAccountData(address).notice: Returns the user account data across all reserves.

supply(address,uint256,address,uint16).notice: Supplies an amount of asset to the pool, receiving aTokens in return.

withdraw(address,uint256,address).notice: Withdraws an amount of asset from the pool, burning aTokens.
